mapper.update: INSERT INTO trigger_partition_record (trigger_code, partition_date, status, triggered, instance_id, create_time, update_time, version) VALUES (#{triggerCode}, #{partitionDate}, 'TRIGGERING', 0, #{instanceId}, NOW(), NOW(), 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = CASE WHEN status = 'TRIGGERING' AND instance_id = #{instanceId} THEN 'TRIGGERING' WHEN status = 'TRIGGERED' THEN 'TRIGGERED' ELSE 'TRIGGERING' END, instance_id = #{instanceId}, update_time = NOW()

UPDATE trigger_partition_record SET status = 'TRIGGERED', triggered = 1, pipeline_task_id = #{pipelineTaskId}, trigger_time = NOW(), instance_id = #{instanceId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE trigger_code = #{triggerCode} AND partition_date = #{partitionDate}
